JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR CT. TRIAL, SETTLED ON THE RECORD AS TO SYLVESTER JASZCZEWSKI, SENT TO DEPT. #3 FOR PROVE-UP ON WILLIAM ROSK. #3 JUDGE CHOPPELAS - C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT; DEFT. ROSK NOT PRESENT; PRIMA FACIE CASE PRESENTED; COURT ORDERED JUDG- MENT FOR THE PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSK, WILLIAM JASZCZEWSKI, SYLVESTER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 525 O'FARRELL ST, APT. 402, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,529.53 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,529.53, STAYED UNTIL APR-07-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, 12 NOON. EVICTION STAYED AS TO DEFT. JAZCZEWSKI ONLY, DAMAGES & COST PER COSTS BILL AGAINST DEFT. WILLIAM ROSK ONLY. SEE JUDGMENT FOR OTHER TERMS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
